data.content:
Plan review approval, 2026-04-25

Reviewed the diagnostic/implementation plan. It is complete and feasible for the broad Codex detail-output visibility problem. It overlaps with the narrower follow-up knots a89b (Codex delta/outputDelta parsing) and c30f (approval request visibility), so implementation should either coordinate with those knots or use this knot as the umbrella if the workflow owner chooses to merge scope. The plan correctly names the f354/adrian evidence, the params.delta root cause, outputDelta translation gap, empty reasoning `(no text)` spam, and the Playwright approval visibility gap. Approved for implementation with the coordination note above.
